collections.name: Meetings
collections.description: Templates for structuring meeting notes and follow-ups

skills.name: one-on-one-meeting
skills.description: Format meeting notes for a 1:1 meeting. Use when the user wants to structure a canvas for a one-on-one meeting with a direct report, manager, or teammate. Captures priorities, progress, challenges, feedback, and next steps in a concise, actionable format. Triggers include requests to "set up 1:1 notes", "format this as a 1:1", "structure my one-on-one", or any meeting canvas involving two people.

skills.name: standup-meeting
skills.description: Format meeting notes for a daily standup. Use when the user wants to structure a canvas for a standup, daily sync, or scrum meeting. Documents each participant's updates on accomplishments, current focus, and blockers. Triggers include requests to "format standup notes", "structure my daily sync", "set up standup", or any short recurring team meeting focused on status updates.

collections.name: Planning
collections.description: Templates for planning, change management, and organisational work

skills.name: manage-change
skills.description: Organisational change management with stakeholder analysis, communication planning, and adoption tracking. Use when rolling out a new process, tool migration, or organisational restructure. Trigger with "manage change for", "change management plan", "how do we roll out [change]".
